stages.concept:
# Unit 043: 현재완료의 형태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **현재완료의 형태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I **have lived** in Seoul for five years.
> 나는 서울에서 5년 동안 살았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 현재완료는 **have/has + 과거분사(p.p.)** 형태예요. 과거에 시작된 일이 현재까지 영향을 미칠 때 써요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어가 I, You, We, They일 때 → **have + p.p.**

> I **have finished** my homework.
> 나는 숙제를 끝냈다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어가 He, She, It일 때 → **has + p.p.**

> She **has visited** Paris twice.
> 그녀는 파리를 두 번 방문했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정문**: have/has + not + p.p.

> I **have not** (haven't) seen that movie.
> 나는 그 영화를 본 적이 없다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의문문**: Have/Has + 주어 + p.p. ~?

> **Have** you ever been to Japan? — Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
> 너는 일본에 가본 적이 있니?

🧑‍🎓 학생: 현재완료는 have/has + 과거분사! 주어에 따라 have/has를 구별하면 되는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 043: 현재진행형의 미래대용 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I (     ) at home tomorrow.
> **정답** am working

---

**02.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She (     ) to Seoul next week.
> **정답** is moving

---

**03.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They (     ) to a concert tonight.
> **정답** are going

---

**04.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He (     ) his friend this weekend.
> **정답** is meeting

---

**05.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
We (     ) dinner out tomorrow evening.
> **정답** are having

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is leave for Japan tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** leave → leaving

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They is coming to visit us next month.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → are

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I am take the bus to school tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** take → taking

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He are playing tennis with Tom this afternoon.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We is going shopping this weekend.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → are

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 내일 친구를 만나러 간다.
I my friend tomorrow.
> **정답** am meeting

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 다음 주에 부산으로 떠난다.
She for Busan next week.
> **정답** is leaving

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그들은 오늘 저녁에 영화를 본다.
They a movie tonight.
> **정답** are watching

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
우리는 이번 토요일에 캠핑을 간다.
We this Saturday.
> **정답** are going camping

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
엄마가 내일 아침에 일찍 출발하신다.
My mom early tomorrow morning.
> **정답** is leaving

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 오늘 밤에 친구 집에서 잔다.
am I at staying my friend's house tonight
> **정답** I / am / staying / at / my / friend's / house / tonight

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 내일 치과에 간다.
to He going the dentist is tomorrow
> **정답** He / is / going / to / the / dentist / tomorrow

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우리는 다음 주에 시험을 본다.
are taking We exam an next week
> **정답** We / are / taking / an / exam / next / week

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 이번 주말에 할머니 댁에 간다.
visiting She grandmother's is her house this weekend
> **정답** She / is / visiting / her / grandmother's / house / this / weekend

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그들은 내일 축구 시합을 한다.
playing are They a tomorrow soccer match
> **정답** They / are / playing / a / soccer / match / tomorrow
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 043: 현재진행형의 미래대용 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I __________ my friends tomorrow.
am meeting
meet
was meeting
don't meet
> **정답** am meeting

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They __________ lunch in an hour.
was having
have
had
are having
> **정답** are having

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy __________ on a vacation next week.
go
is going
are going
was going
> **정답** is going

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I __________ a movie with her at four.
She __________ to see movies with me.
am watching - likes
watch - likes
am watching - is liking
watch - is liking
> **정답** am watching - likes

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
She __________ me a package yesterday.
The package __________ tomorrow morning.
sent- is arriving
sent- arrives
sends- is arriving
sends- arrives
> **정답** sent- is arriving

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: What are you __________ tomorrow?
B: We __________ a video for English homework.
do - are filmming
doing - are filming
doing - film
do - were filming
> **정답** doing - are filming

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. [정답 2개]
Tom은 곧 숙제를 끝낼 것이다.
Tom will finishes his homework soon.
Tom will finish his homework soon.
Tom is finishing his homework soon.
Tom finishes his homework soon.
> **정답** Tom will finish his homework soon., Tom is finishing
his homework soon.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
나는 다음 달에 프라하에 갈 것이다.
I'm not going Prague next month.
I'm going to Prague next month.
I am going to go to Prague next month.
I go Prague next month.
> **정답** I am going to go to Prague next month., I'm going to
Prague next month.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 3주 후에 아기를 낳을 것이다.
She had a baby in three weeks.
She is have a baby in three weeks.
She will have a baby in three weeks.
She is having a baby in three weeks.
> **정답** She is having a baby in three weeks., She will have a
baby in three weeks.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I am studying Spanish these days.
They were going fishing tomorrow.
She is going to play tennis after school.
We are leaving for Japan this Friday.
> **정답** They were going fishing tomorrow.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Tom isn't fitting his old shirts. He needs
a new one. He is go shopping with his friend
tomorrow. They were meeting at four o'clock.
> **정답** fitting, needs, going, are

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개, 진행형 사용]
Tomorrow is Christmas Day. My sister
believes in Santa Claus. She write a
letter to Santa Claus last year. She
writes a letter this year as well.
> **정답** is, believes, wrote, is writing

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
We are talking about a study plan now.
Amy is taking an exam next month.
She is feeding her baby now.
Tom and Amy were leaving for Korea soon.
> **정답** Tom and Amy were leaving for Korea soon.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I was having an interview tomorrow.
The leaves are turning red or yellow.
Amy and her mom are making dessert in the
kitchen.
Mr. Park is practicing gymnastics next
week.
> **정답** I was having an interview tomorrow.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
Amy는 이번주에 나를 산으로 데려갈 것이다.
is taking me
to the mountain
takes me
this week
> **정답** takes me

---

**16.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
Tom은 내일 밤을 새지 않을 것이다.
doesn't stay up
isn't staying up
all night
tomorrow
> **정답** doesn't stay up

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
We go to the beach with my
friends this Sunday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** go → are going (will go)

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
He takes an English exam
tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** takes → is taking (will take)

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
They meeting for a group
presentation tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** meeting → are meeting (will meet)

---

**20.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오. (진행형 사용)
They do not play soccer this
afternoon.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** do not play → are not playing (aren't playing, will
not play, won't play)
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 043 현재진행형의 미래대용중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
달리기 선수가 지금 트랙에서 달리고 있는 중이다.
힌트 (     ) be, run
The sprinter  (     )   (     )  in the track now.
• sprinter 달리기 선수
정답 is, running

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 내일 내 친구와 드론을 날릴 것이다.
힌트 (     ) be, fly, a drone
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  with my friend
tomorrow.
정답 am, flying, a, drone

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
비행기가 곧 이륙할 것이다.
힌트 (     ) be, take off
The airplane  (     )   (     )   (     )  soon.
정답 is, taking, off

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우리는 내일 도서관에 갈 예정이다.
힌트 (     ) be, go to, the library
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  tomorrow.
정답 are, going, to, the, library

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
Amy는 다음달에 미국으로 유학을 갈 것이다.
힌트 (     ) be, study, abroad
Amy  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the United States next
month.
정답 is, studying, abroad

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
be, leave
A: When are you leaving for Paris?
B: I  (     )   (     )  tomorrow.
정답 am, leaving

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
be, go on a field trip
A: What are they doing tomorrow?
B: They  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 tomorrow.
정답 are, going, on, a, field, trip

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
be, visit
A: Hey, did you hear the news? Sarah is in the hospital
now.
B: Oh, I'm sorry to hear that. I  (     )   (     )  her
tomorrow.
정답 am, visiting

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화를 완성하시오.
be, make a decision
A: How about joining our English club?
B: I'm not sure. I  (     )   (     )   (     )  
tomorrow.
• make a decision 결정하다
정답 am, making, a, decision

---

**10.** 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을 완성하시오.
I [be]  very busy now. I [not, have] (     )  time to
eat lunch. So, I'm [starve]  now. I'm [order]  a
delivery by app soon.]
정답 am, don't have, starving, ordering

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 043: 현재진행형의 미래대용 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I __________ my cousin tomorrow. am meeting meet was meeting don't meet
> 정답: am meeting

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They __________ dinner in an hour. was having have had are having
> 정답: are having

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Jake __________ on a trip next week. go is going are going was going
> 정답: is going

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I __________ a show with her at five.
She __________ to see shows with me. am watching - likes watch - likes am watching - is liking watch - is liking
> 정답: am watching - likes

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She __________ me a gift yesterday.
The gift __________ tomorrow morning. sent- is arriving sent- arrives sends- is arriving sends- arrives
> 정답: sent- is arriving

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: What are you __________ tomorrow?
B: We __________ a poster for the school project. do - are drawwing doing - are drawing doing - draw do - were drawing
> 정답: doing - are drawing

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
> 정답: 2개]

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
나는 다음 달에 도쿄에 갈 것이다.
I'm not going Tokyo next month.
I'm going to Tokyo next month.
I am going to go to Tokyo next month.
I go Tokyo next month.
> 정답: I am going to go to Tokyo next month., I'm going to

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 2주 후에 이사를 할 것이다.
She moved in two weeks.
She is move in two weeks.
She will move in two weeks.
She is moving in two weeks.
> 정답: She is moving in two weeks., She will move in

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I am learning Korean these days.
They were going camping tomorrow.
She is going to play the piano after school.
We are leaving for Japan this Friday.
> 정답: They were going camping tomorrow.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Amy isn't fitting her old shoes.
She needs a new pair.
She is go shopping with her mom tomorrow.
They were meeting at three o'clock.
> 정답: fitting, needs, going, are

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개, 진행형 사용] Tomorrow is Children's Day.
My brother believes in superheroes.
He write a letter to his hero last year.
He writes a letter this year as well.
> 정답: is, believes, wrote, is writing

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
We are talking about a weekend plan now.
Amy is taking a test next week.
She is feeding her cat now.
Jake and Mina were leaving for Busan soon.
> 정답: Jake and Mina were leaving for Busan soon.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I was having a meeting tomorrow.
The flowers are blooming in the garden.
Tom and his dad are making dinner in the kitchen.
Mr. Lee is practicing basketball next week.
> 정답: I was having a meeting tomorrow.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
Amy는 이번주에 나를 바다로 데려갈 것이다. is taking me to the beach takes me this week
